dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent demonstrated perfect adherence to governance protocols, including successful schema validation and correct utilization of versioned prompt paths as defined in the CAS framework.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: While the reasoning process was successful, the completion token count (7,936) and duration are significantly lower than the baseline (65,295 tokens), indicating a reduction in the depth of causal exploration.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The agent successfully executed the architecture-work-assessment flow. The lower output volume suggests a more concise analysis of trade-offs compared to the baseline, though the core task was completed without error.
